cost_components_summary: Annualised DRI shaft-furnace conversion cost excluding explicitly listed iron ore, hydrogen, and electricity inputs.
input_basis_notes: Direct DRI production inputs only. Pelletising, fluxes, and minor materials are outside the Phase 1 pilot boundary.
emissions_boundary_notes: Direct DRI production emissions only. Upstream hydrogen and electricity emissions are represented outside this end-use coefficient.
rollout_limit_notes: Pilot envelope only. Shares are indicative and exist to test decomposition topology, not to settle steel deployment constraints.
availability_conditions: Treated as material only from 2030 onward through share caps; 2025 row is retained for milestone completeness.
evidence_summary: Pilot split from the aggregate H2 DRI electric steel route plus IEA and Australian steel-transition benchmarks; values are indicative topology-test data.
derivation_method: Reduced-form decomposition split. Aggregate H2 DRI route inputs are separated into DRI production and downstream melt/refine finishing rows.
review_notes: Pilot split of the aggregate H2 DRI route. Hydrogen and power intensities are route archetypes, not plant-specific engineering values.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Expand into pelletising, shaft furnace, hydrogen supply, heat recovery, and intermediate DRI storage modules.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Intermediate DRI production role feeding melt_refine_dri_crude_steel in the decomposition pilot.

cost_components_summary: Delivered imported DRI proxy cost; upstream production costs and emissions are outside this package boundary.
input_basis_notes: No domestic process inputs are assigned to imported DRI in this pilot.
emissions_boundary_notes: No domestic direct emissions are assigned to imported DRI in this pilot boundary.
rollout_limit_notes: Pilot envelope only. Shares are indicative and exist to test decomposition topology, not to settle steel deployment constraints.
availability_conditions: Available only as a bounded residual option for process-chain feasibility testing.
evidence_summary: Placeholder residual import option retained so the melt/refine child can be tested without forcing domestic DRI in every scenario.
derivation_method: Residual supply proxy with no domestic process inputs or direct emissions in this library boundary.
review_notes: Imported DRI is a feasibility placeholder, not an Australian supply forecast.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Replace with explicit traded DRI supply, upstream emissions accounting, and import constraints.
